query:
SELECT 
  JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks') as imp0_links,
  JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.improvements[1].shoppingLinks') as imp1_links,
  JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.improvements[2].shoppingLinks') as imp2_links,
  JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.improvements[3].shoppingLinks') as imp3_links
FROM reviews WHERE id = 630002
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute SELECT 
  JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks') as imp0_links,
  JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.improvements[1].shoppingLinks') as imp1_links,
  JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.improvements[2].shoppingLinks') as imp2_links,
  JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.improvements[3].shoppingLinks') as imp3_links
FROM reviews WHERE id = 630002
